open_incident.description: Open a shared incident, record an activity event, and wake Panda.
open_incident.wakeMessage: A {{input.severity}} incident was opened: {{input.title}}. Owner {{input.owner}}. Source {{input.source}}. Follow up only if coordination would help.
sql: insert into incidents (opened_at, due_on, title, severity, status, owner, source, details, created_at) values (:opened_at, coalesce(nullif(:due_on, ''), date(:now, '+1 day')), :title, :severity, 'investigating', nullif(:owner, ''), coalesce(nullif(:source, ''), 'manual'), nullif(:details, ''), :now)
insert into incident_events (incident_id, event_type, note, created_at) values (last_insert_rowid(), 'opened', coalesce(nullif(:details, ''), :title), :now)

triage_incident.description: Update incident status, owner, and due date without waking Panda.
sql: update incidents set status = :status, owner = coalesce(nullif(:owner, ''), owner), due_on = coalesce(nullif(:due_on, ''), due_on), resolved_at = case when :status = 'resolved' then :now else resolved_at end where id = :id
insert into incident_events (incident_id, event_type, note, created_at) values (:id, 'triaged', 'status=' || :status, :now)

resolve_incident.description: Resolve one incident and wake Panda with the outcome.
sql: update incidents set status = 'resolved', resolved_at = :now where id = :id
insert into incident_events (incident_id, event_type, note, created_at) values (:id, 'resolved', :note, :now)
